articles.title: MBTA police seeking suspect who allegedly spat on, hit rider
articles.description:

summary: MBTA police are investigating an assault at Prudential station on February 27.

articles.title: Thune says Senate to consider voting bill but pushes back on demands for ‘talking filibuster’
articles.description:
Trump has said he won’t sign any other legislation until the bill — known as the Safeguard American Voter Eligibility or SAVE America Act — is passed.

The post Thune says Senate to consider voting bill but pushes back on demands for ‘talking filibuster’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Senator Thune announced Senate consideration of the SAVE America Act voting bill.
Trump demands the bill's passage before signing any further legislation.
Boston residents may face delays in voting reforms pending Senate decisions.
